master_bedroom.tip: Ensure the bed is in the South or West, head pointing South.

remedies.NE: Place a brass Vastu pyramid in SW corner. Paint walls cream or ivory. Sleep with head towards South.
Place a Jupiter yantra. Avoid placing sink and stove together. Paint walls yellow.
remedies.SW: Keep heavy items in the South/West of the kitchen. Paint walls earthy colors. Place a Vastu pyramid.

puja_room.tip: Face East or North while praying.

remedies.S: Ensure the idol doesn't face North. Add bright lighting. Place a copper wind chime.
remedies.SW: Place a Rahu yantra. Keep the area extremely clean. Use light yellow colors.

main_entrance.tip: Keep the entrance well-lit and clutter-free.

remedies.SW: Place a pair of lead metal blocks at the entrance. Hang a Bagua mirror outside. Paint door red or dark brown.

toilet_bathroom.tip: Ensure toilet seat faces North or South.

remedies.NE: Keep a bowl of sea salt. Hang a Vastu zinc pyramid on the door. Keep door closed.
remedies.SW: Use earthen colors in bathroom. Keep plants outside the bathroom. Install bright lights.

living_room.tip: Place heavy furniture in West or South.

remedies.SW: Keep the SW corner heavy. Avoid seating guests in the SW corner. Add indoor plants.

remedies.NE: Paint the staircase in light colors. Place a brass tortoise at the bottom. Keep it well-lit.
remedies.CENTER: Suspend a copper helix from the ceiling. Place crystals on steps. Do not keep space under stairs dark.

children_bedroom.tip: Study table should face East or North.

remedies.SW: Use calming green colors. Place a lead pyramid. Avoid violent posters.
remedies.NE: Place a water feature in N/NE of the room. Keep study desk in East. Use yellow shades.

store_room.tip: Do not sleep in a store room.

remedies.NE: Clear clutter immediately. Keep small transparent crystals. Ensure bright lighting.

study_room.tip: Face East or North while studying.

remedies.SW: Study facing North. Sit in the NE corner of the room. Use light blue colors.

dining_room.tip: Face East, North, or West while eating.

remedies.SW: Place a mirror on the East or North wall. Use orange or light red elements. Hang a copper wind chime.

guest_bedroom.tip: Keep the room airy and welcoming.

remedies.SW: Use metallic decor elements. Avoid heavy dark furniture. Paint walls ivory.

remedies.NE: Place a crystal pyramid on the desk. Ensure an open layout. Use green shades.

garage.tip: Park vehicles facing North or East.

remedies.NE: Keep garage spotlessly clean. Park slightly away from the NE wall. Paint in white or cream.
remedies.SW: Install a heavy metal door. Make sure the floor slopes towards the North or East.

rectangle.notes: Good, especially if ratio is 1:2. Brings stability.

l_shape.notes: Considered incomplete. May cause missing corners issues.

newly_married.special_advice: Focus on the SW corner for marital harmony.

elderly_parents.special_advice: Ensure their room is in SW or S for peaceful rest.

young_children.special_advice: East and North areas must be open to foster growth and creativity.

joint_family.special_advice: Center of the house (Brahmasthan) should be completely open.

home_office.special_advice: Face North while working for financial growth.

business_owner.special_advice: Ensure North entrance for continuous wealth flow.

Earth.balance_tip: Add heavy furniture and square shapes.

Water.balance_tip: Keep area open, light, and use wavy patterns.
Water.imbalance_effects: Lack of opportunities and poor health.

Fire.balance_tip: Use bright lights, triangular shapes, and warm colors.
Fire.imbalance_effects: Loss of passion and legal issues.

Air.balance_tip: Ensure good ventilation, use circular shapes.
